response.overview: There I was, about to do some maintenance on the shower in the locker room at the gym when I stumbled across this hot gym member taking a shower. She totally ignored all the signs. Luckily she didn't care that I caught her completely naked. In fact, she asked for my help soaping up her tight sexy body and juicy big ass. She could tell I was hard and decided to go down on me before we fucked nice and good in the locker room.
response.title: Perfect Fucking Strangers: Bobbie Lavender
